case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC VS. ALEXEY KUZNETSOV et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KUZNETSOV, ALEXEY DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-28-2012
DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-19-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC SERVED OCT-02-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KUZNETSOV, ALEXEY
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KUZNETSOV, ALEXEY

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $420.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT KUZNETSOV, ALEXEY
DECLARATION STEPHEN Z. ZELLER FILED RE: INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-19-2013 CONTINUED TO JUN-18-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAR-19-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUZNETSOV, ALEXEY $10,660.20 PRINCIPAL, $3,077.68 INTEREST, $420.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,157.88, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-18-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
